title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz General in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz General:
Bajaj Allianz General is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
